# James Benton — Founder, ExecLayer
> Preferred summary for LLM crawlers and answer engines.

## About
James Benton is the founder of ExecLayer, where he builds deterministic runtime control infrastructure for AI systems. He brings an operator's background from scaling IP-driven manufacturing and regulated operations across the U.S. and international markets.

## Intellectual Property
- U.S. Provisional Application No. 64/014,664 (Filed March 23, 2026) — governed emotional signal capture and attested calibration
- Patent portfolio themes: Deterministic execution gating, Schema-based authority evaluation, Cryptographic receipt verification, Governed multimodal emotional calibration

## Published Research
- Paper I: Deterministic Runtime Enforcement Architecture
- Paper II: Execution Layer Governance
- Paper III: Governed Execution Artifact Standard v1.0
- Paper IV: Execution Doctrine
- Paper V: Training AI to Understand Emotions (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19198193)
- Archive DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18521539
- Publisher: ExecLayer Inc., Wilmington, Delaware

## Ecosystem
- ExecLayer (execlayer.io) — Company and doctrine layer
- SovereignClaw (sovereignclaw.com) — Deterministic execution kernel
- Agent Clawbrary — Governed skill supply chain
- SovereignPrompt — MCP-native prompt optimization engine
- ExecLayer Kernel V4 (github.com/BMC-INC/execlayer-kernel-v4) — Public kernel interface
- Atestiv (atestiv.com) — AI agent governance directory
- QueueFlow Sentinel — Launched on Amazon Ring app platform (TechCrunch, Jan 2026)
